title: Maladi (disambiguation)
content:
'''Maladi''' could refer to one of the following:

*'''[[Darth Maladi]]''', a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] of the [[One Sith]]
**[[Gender/Legends|Her]] '''[[Darth Maladi's parent|parent]]'''
**Her '''[[Darth Maladi's laboratory|laboratory]]'''
*The '''[[Maladi sector/Legends|Maladi sector]]''', a [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] and [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]]
*The '''[[Maladi system/Legends|Maladi system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] within the Maladi sector
*The '''[[Maladian]]s''', a cult of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] originating within the Maladi system

{{Disambig}}
